title: Sleepless Nights
description: Makes sleeping impossible, forcing you to use your time wisely.
body:
A mod to make your nights longer than ever.

## Features Disables sleeping in beds, making it necessary to figure out what to do with your time; go mining or explore the world during night, I promise, it's more fun! Since beds are disabled, the phantom spawn rate has been decreased by 80%, no need to worry about having to deal with phantoms each and every night.
